#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Configuration](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Configuration')

## SnapshotOptions Class

Configuration options for aggregate state snapshot creation\.
Snapshot intervals are mandatory \(enforcement rule \#15\) and configurable per domain\.

```csharp
public record SnapshotOptions : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions>
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') &#129106; SnapshotOptions

Implements [System\.IEquatable&lt;](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.iequatable-1 'System\.IEquatable\`1')[SnapshotOptions](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Configuration\.SnapshotOptions')[&gt;](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.iequatable-1 'System\.IEquatable\`1')

### Remarks

<b>Minimum interval enforcement:</b> All intervals must be >= 10 to prevent accidental
            performance degradation from overly frequent snapshots. Configuration validation rejects
            values below this threshold.

<b>DEPLOYMENT SECURITY:</b> Snapshot intervals can be loaded from DAPR config store
            for dynamic updates (NFR20). Write access to the config store must be restricted to admin
            service accounts only (Red Team H2).

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions.MinimumInterval'></a>

## SnapshotOptions\.MinimumInterval Field

Minimum allowed snapshot interval\. Values below this threshold are rejected
to prevent performance degradation from overly frequent snapshots\.

```csharp
public const int MinimumInterval = 10;
```

### Properties

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions.DefaultInterval'></a>

## SnapshotOptions\.DefaultInterval Property

Gets the default snapshot interval \(number of events between snapshots\)\.
Applies to all domains unless overridden in [DomainIntervals](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions.DomainIntervals 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Configuration\.SnapshotOptions\.DomainIntervals')\.
Default: 100 events \(enforcement rule \#15\)\.

```csharp
public int DefaultInterval { get; init; }
```

#### Property Value
[System\.Int32](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.int32 'System\.Int32')

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions.DomainIntervals'></a>

## SnapshotOptions\.DomainIntervals Property

Gets per\-domain snapshot interval overrides\.
Key: domain name \(lowercase\)\. Value: snapshot interval for that domain\.
Domains not present in this dictionary use [DefaultInterval](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Configuration.SnapshotOptions.DefaultInterval 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Configuration\.SnapshotOptions\.DefaultInterval')\.

```csharp
public System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string,int> DomainIntervals { get; init; }
```
